metadata.description: Private plugin marketplace for Nic's business tools

plugins.name: cfo-finance-mastery
plugins.description: CFO-level financial analysis, modeling, forecasting, dashboards, profit optimization, and strategic advisory.

plugins.name: cold-outbound-mastery
plugins.description: Cold email, LinkedIn outreach, cold calling, DM outreach, email infrastructure, and campaign operations.

plugins.name: cro-copywriting-mastery
plugins.description: Complete CRO copywriting system: 14 skills covering customer research, awareness stages, offer engineering, unique mechanisms, benefit translation, page architecture, headlines/hooks, body copy craft, story-driven copy, sales pages/VSLs, email sequences, objection/proof psychology, CTAs/conversion elements, and testing/auditing. Built from 12+ expert courses.

plugins.name: design-mastery
plugins.description: Web design, UI components, Figma workflows, Webflow, Shopify themes, logo design, and brand identity systems.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: 18 marketing skills: CRO, email sequences, pricing, launch strategy, churn prevention, referral programs, marketing psychology.

plugins.name: paid-ads-mastery
plugins.description: Google Ads and Meta Ads: account setup, campaign strategy, creative production (traditional + AI), optimization, scaling.

plugins.name: sales-negotiation-mastery
plugins.description: Discovery, demos, objection handling, negotiation, closing, and pipeline management.

plugins.name: seo-mastery
plugins.description: Keyword research, content strategy, technical SEO, link building, local/ecommerce SEO at scale, and analytics.

plugins.name: course-to-plugin
plugins.description: Transform course transcripts into production-ready plugins. Supports new builds and updating existing plugins with recursive deep audits.

plugins.name: email-marketing-mastery
plugins.description: Email marketing across ecommerce and creator businesses: flows, campaigns, launches, welcome sequences, subject lines, copywriting, deliverability, segmentation, newsletters, and monetization.

plugins.name: social-content-mastery
plugins.description: Complete organic social media content creation system for personal brands and creators. 18 skills covering brand foundation, content strategy, hook writing, scriptwriting, video production, platform-specific growth (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Twitter/X, YouTube), publishing optimization, monetization, brand partnerships, community building, ghostwriting/freelance, and AI-assisted workflows.

plugins.name: funnel-mastery
plugins.description: Sales funnel strategy and execution: funnel economics, offer design, funnel architecture, sales pages, VSLs, advertorials, upsells/downsells, backend sequences, checkout optimization, and CRO.

plugins.name: dtc-mastery
plugins.description: End-to-end DTC brand building across Shopify, Amazon, and TikTok Shop. Covers product ideation, sourcing, manufacturing, platform setup, launch, pricing, influencer marketing, operations, scaling, and exit strategy.

plugins.name: agency-mastery
plugins.description: Expert agency advisor covering foundation, positioning, client acquisition, sales, onboarding, delivery, client management, finance, and scaling. Synthesizes Shan Hanif, Dee Deng, and Donvesh.
